sections.paragraph:
Eze 16:34, 41 Eze 16:41, and אֶתְנָן m. (for תְּנָן with א prosthet. from תָּנָה), with suff. אֶתְנַנִּי.

(1) gain of a harlot, absol. Eze 16:31, 34 Eze 16:34and with the addition of זֹונָה Deu 23:19. Metaph. used of the produce of the fields, which the idolators looked on as gifts from the idols, Hos 9:1 Mic 1:7 comp. Isa 23:17, 18 Isa 23:18.

(2) [Ethnan], pr.n.m. 1Ch 4:7.
